# Torq Orbit

> Zero-commission online ordering and digital storefront software for Indian local businesses — restaurants, cafes, cloud kitchens, home bakers, tiffin services, retail shops, and home service providers.

Torq Orbit helps business owners launch a branded online store in minutes, receive orders on WhatsApp, accept optional online payments, and keep 100% of order value with no delivery-app commission.

Built in Mumbai, India.

## Domains

- Marketing site: https://orbit.torqstudio.com
- Customer store links: torqorbit.in/yourbusiness

## Product

- Commission-free digital menus and online storefronts
- WhatsApp ordering with structured order messages
- Real-time menu, price, and availability control
- QR codes and shareable links (torqorbit.in/yourbusiness)
- Optional payment gateway on paid plans (2% gateway fee only)
- Orders and sales dashboard on Growth and Premium plans
- Branding, custom domain, loyalty, and analytics on Premium

## Business types supported

- Restaurant, cafe, and cloud kitchen
- E-commerce and retail (fashion, lifestyle, home items)
- Home services (plumbers, electricians, carpenters, etc.)

## Pricing (INR, monthly)

- Free: ₹0 forever — unlimited items, WhatsApp alerts, QR code, 2 templates, menu management
- Growth: ₹499/month — payments, order dashboard, WhatsApp status updates (28-day free trial)
- Premium: ₹999/month — full branding, logo, custom domain, loyalty, analytics (28-day free trial)

## Contact

- Email: connect@torqstudio.com
- WhatsApp: +91 79771 48243
- Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

## Structured data

Homepage JSON-LD includes Organization, SoftwareApplication, WebPage, and FAQPage schemas. Blog posts include BlogPosting schema.
